purpose: Counterfactual tracker - the memory of the road not taken. EVERY decision NOT to act (veto, skip, rejection) and every exit (stop-loss, sell) is recorded here with the price at decision time. The weekly review checks what those stocks did afterward and grades whether the decision was right. This is what closes the learning loop: the system learns not just from trades it made, but from trades it refused.

entry_format.decision: QUALITY_VETO | COMMITTEE_REJECT | MACRO_SKIP | CAP_SKIP | STOP_LOSS | SELL_SIGNAL | EXIT_TRIGGER

grading_rule: Weekly review grades entries >= 14 days old: for vetoes/skips/rejections - if the stock rose >5% since, the decision was WRONG (we missed gains); if flat or down, RIGHT. For stop-losses/sells - if the stock kept falling >5%, RIGHT; if it recovered >5%, WRONG (too hasty). Mark graded=true with result and price checked.
